title: A Study and Analysis of European Funding Projects, Proposals, Steps and Questionnaire Clarifications
author: Dr. Jose Prabhu J
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The purpose of this questionnaire is to provide funding agencies with details information about the project and the real needs of the area it pertains to. It will be used as a basis for the study of your application, so please ensure to answer all the questions in full. This will facilitate the work of both parties. The project proposal composing strategy matters to share as well as define concerning your vision, demand, capacity, ability. Define the problems of the location concerning the project is worried as well as much more especially it represents the account inappropriate as well as the certain manner in which can persuade the funding companies, funding agencies, and the bodies who are the give.
